heading: Walyormouring vs Walyunga National Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Walyormouring, Western Australia and Walyunga National Park, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Walyunga National Park has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Walyormouring (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Walyormouring or Walyunga National Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Walyormouring has a flood risk score of 45/100, while Walyunga National Park scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Walyormouring scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. Walyunga National Park scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Walyormouring or Walyunga National Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Walyunga National Park has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
